description: A voluptuous, oversized woman in an enormous pink billowing dress with yellow lace trim stands in a garden setting. She wears a large wide-brimmed hat and holds a small flower. Beside her, reaching only to her waist, stands a tiny man in a black suit holding a painter's palette. A green parrot perches on the woman's right arm and a red bird flies at the upper left. Green trees form the background. The proportions are deliberately exaggerated and humorous.
